title: CLARITY Act could help CFTC deal with prediction markets: Lawyer
summary: According to one lawyer testifying before a House subcommittee hearing, the CLARITY Act could grant the CFTC the authority it needs to address the “explosive growth of prediction markets.”

title: Movement Labs files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy after months of MOVE token turmoil
summary: The blockchain developer will continue operating under court supervision as it restructures following a market-making scandal, a co-founder’s suspension, and exchange delistings that rocked the project.

title: Moody’s Lifts Argentina Debt Rating in Fresh Boost to Milei
summary: Moody’s Ratings upgraded Argentina’s credit score, giving the nation its third sovereign upgrade in less than three months and further validating President Javier Milei’s economic overhaul plan.

title: Banks Wrap Up Loan Backing SoftBank’s $5.4 Billion Robotics Bet
summary: A group of banks wrapped up a loan offering backing SoftBank Group Corp.’s $5.4 billion robotics bet after increasing the size of the US dollar tranche.

title: Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node
The proposal to temporarily restrict arbitrary data in Bitcoin transactions lacks economic nodes, protocol developers, and hashrate. History from the 2017 UASF shows nodes succeed only with broad investor and developer weight behind them.

title: Bitcoin Maxi Jack Dorsey Unveils New Open Source Group Chat App
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Maxi Jack Dorsey Unveils New Open Source Group Chat App
Jack Dorsey's company Block has debuted a decentralized rival to group chat platform Slack.

title: OpenAI Models Escaped Locked Test Environment, Hacked Hugging Face to Cheat on Benchmark
summary: OpenAI's own models just broke out of a sandboxed environment, hacked Hugging Face, just to cheat on a cybersecurity evaluation.

title: Pavel Durov Wants to Give a Billion Telegram Users a Crypto Wallet
summary: The promise of instant, zero-fee crypto transactions for over a billion Telegram users sent its native Gram token up 7%.

title: Trump-backed crypto ethics rule puts DOJ in charge of enforcement, prohibits federal officials from issuing cryptocurrencies
summary: Newly approved ethics language signed by President Donald Trump would prohibit federal officials from issuing cryptocurrencies.

title: The Digital Chamber sues Illinois over incoming crypto transaction tax
summary: The Digital Chamber is taking Illinois to court over its decision to pass a law imposing a 0.2% tax on digital asset transactions.

title: Zelenskyy replaces top Ukraine general after mass protests
summary: President chooses 43-year-old Mykhailo Drapatyi to replace Oleksandr Syrsky in generational shift in Kyiv’s military leadership

title: The Gulf nation that became Iran’s softest target
summary: Kuwait, still scarred by the 1990 Iraqi invasion, has been repeatedly attacked by Tehran and its allies
